# SingleArmMRCT

## Overview

**SingleArmMRCT** provides functions to calculate and visualise the
**Regional Consistency Probability (RCP)** for single-arm multi-regional
clinical trials (MRCTs) using the **Effect Retention Approach (ERA)**.

The package addresses a critical methodological gap: current Japanese
MHLW Method 1 and Method 2 consistency criteria were originally
developed for two-arm trials, yet single-arm trials increasingly form
the basis of regulatory submissions, particularly in oncology. This
package extends classical approaches to the single-arm setting across
six endpoint types.

### Supported endpoints

| Endpoint type                        | Calculation function                                                                                                | Plot function                                                                                                                 |
|--------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| Continuous                           | [`rcp1armContinuous()`](https://gosukehommaEX.github.io/SingleArmMRCT/reference/rcp1armContinuous.md)               | [`plot_rcp1armContinuous()`](https://gosukehommaEX.github.io/SingleArmMRCT/reference/plot_rcp1armContinuous.md)               |
| Binary                               | [`rcp1armBinary()`](https://gosukehommaEX.github.io/SingleArmMRCT/reference/rcp1armBinary.md)                       | [`plot_rcp1armBinary()`](https://gosukehommaEX.github.io/SingleArmMRCT/reference/plot_rcp1armBinary.md)                       |
| Count (negative binomial)            | [`rcp1armCount()`](https://gosukehommaEX.github.io/SingleArmMRCT/reference/rcp1armCount.md)                         | [`plot_rcp1armCount()`](https://gosukehommaEX.github.io/SingleArmMRCT/reference/plot_rcp1armCount.md)                         |
| Time-to-event (hazard ratio)         | [`rcp1armHazardRatio()`](https://gosukehommaEX.github.io/SingleArmMRCT/reference/rcp1armHazardRatio.md)             | [`plot_rcp1armHazardRatio()`](https://gosukehommaEX.github.io/SingleArmMRCT/reference/plot_rcp1armHazardRatio.md)             |
| Milestone survival                   | [`rcp1armMilestoneSurvival()`](https://gosukehommaEX.github.io/SingleArmMRCT/reference/rcp1armMilestoneSurvival.md) | [`plot_rcp1armMilestoneSurvival()`](https://gosukehommaEX.github.io/SingleArmMRCT/reference/plot_rcp1armMilestoneSurvival.md) |
| Restricted mean survival time (RMST) | [`rcp1armRMST()`](https://gosukehommaEX.github.io/SingleArmMRCT/reference/rcp1armRMST.md)                           | [`plot_rcp1armRMST()`](https://gosukehommaEX.github.io/SingleArmMRCT/reference/plot_rcp1armRMST.md)                           |

### Consistency evaluation methods

- **Method 1** (Effect Retention): Evaluates whether Region 1 retains at
  least a fraction pi of the overall treatment effect.
- **Method 2** (Simultaneous Positivity): Evaluates whether all regional
  estimates exceed the null value simultaneously.

### Calculation approaches

Each function supports two approaches:

- **`"formula"`**: Closed-form or semi-analytical solution based on
  normal approximation.
- **`"simulation"`**: Monte Carlo simulation.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Installation

``` r
install.packages("SingleArmMRCT")
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Quick start

### Continuous endpoint

``` r
library(SingleArmMRCT)

# Closed-form solution: N = 100, Region 1 has 10 subjects (f1 = 0.1)
result <- rcp1armContinuous(
  mu  = 0.5,
  mu0 = 0.1,
  sd  = 1,
  Nj  = c(10, 90),
  PI  = 0.5,
  approach = "formula"
)
print(result)
```

### Binary endpoint

``` r
result <- rcp1armBinary(
  p  = 0.5,
  p0 = 0.2,
  Nj = c(10, 90),
  PI = 0.5,
  approach = "formula"
)
print(result)
```

### Time-to-event endpoint (hazard ratio)

``` r
result <- rcp1armHazardRatio(
  lambda         = log(2) / 10,
  lambda0        = log(2) / 5,
  Nj             = c(10, 90),
  t_a            = 3,
  t_f            = 10,
  lambda_dropout = NULL,
  PI             = 0.5,
  approach       = "formula"
)
print(result)
```

### RMST endpoint

``` r
lam0    <- log(2) / 5
tstar   <- 8
mu0_val <- (1 - exp(-lam0 * tstar)) / lam0

result <- rcp1armRMST(
  lambda   = log(2) / 10,
  tau_star = tstar,
  mu0      = mu0_val,
  Nj       = c(10, 90),
  t_a      = 3,
  t_f      = 10,
  PI       = 0.5,
  approach = "formula"
)
print(result)
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Visualisation

Each endpoint has a corresponding plot function that generates a faceted
plot of RCP as a function of the regional allocation proportion f₁,
overlaying formula and simulation results for both Method 1 and Method
2.

``` r
# Continuous endpoint: RCP vs f1 for N = 20, 40, 100 with J = 3 regions
p <- plot_rcp1armContinuous(
  mu    = 0.5,
  mu0   = 0.1,
  sd    = 1,
  PI    = 0.5,
  N_vec = c(20, 40, 100),
  J     = 3
)
print(p)
```

``` r
# Milestone survival endpoint
p <- plot_rcp1armMilestoneSurvival(
  lambda = log(2) / 10,
  t_eval = 8,
  S0     = exp(-log(2) * 8 / 5),
  t_a    = 3,
  t_f    = 10,
  PI     = 0.5,
  N_vec  = c(20, 40, 100),
  J      = 3
)
print(p)
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Parameter conventions

| Symbol           | Meaning                                    | Notes                               |
|------------------|--------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------|
| `Nj`             | Integer vector of regional sample sizes    | e.g., `c(10, 90)` for J = 2 regions |
| `PI`             | Effect retention threshold pi              | Typically ≥ 0.5; default 0.5        |
| `f1`             | Regional allocation proportion of Region 1 | f₁ = Nj\[1\] / sum(Nj)              |
| `t_a`            | Accrual period                             | Time-to-event endpoints only        |
| `t_f`            | Follow-up period                           | Time-to-event endpoints only        |
| `lambda_dropout` | Dropout hazard rate                        | `NULL` = no dropout                 |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## References

Hayashi N, Itoh Y (2017). A re-examination of Japanese sample size
calculation for multi-regional clinical trial evaluating survival
endpoint. *Japanese Journal of Biometrics*, 38(2): 79–92.
<https://doi.org/10.5691/jjb.38.79>

Homma G (2024). Cautionary note on regional consistency evaluation in
multiregional clinical trials with binary outcomes. *Pharmaceutical
Statistics*, 23(3):385–398. <https://doi.org/10.1002/pst.2358>

Wu J (2015). Sample size calculation for the one-sample log-rank test.
*Pharmaceutical Statistics*, 14(1): 26–33.
<https://doi.org/10.1002/pst.1654>

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Package index

## Continuous endpoint

Calculate and visualise RCP for continuous endpoints.

- [`rcp1armContinuous()`](https://gosukehommaEX.github.io/SingleArmMRCT/reference/rcp1armContinuous.md)
  : Regional Consistency Probability for Single-Arm MRCT (Continuous
  Endpoint)
- [`plot_rcp1armContinuous()`](https://gosukehommaEX.github.io/SingleArmMRCT/reference/plot_rcp1armContinuous.md)
  : Plot Regional Consistency Probability for Single-Arm MRCT
  (Continuous Endpoint)

## Binary endpoint

Calculate and visualise RCP for binary endpoints.

- [`rcp1armBinary()`](https://gosukehommaEX.github.io/SingleArmMRCT/reference/rcp1armBinary.md)
  : Regional Consistency Probability for Single-Arm MRCT (Binary
  Endpoint)
- [`plot_rcp1armBinary()`](https://gosukehommaEX.github.io/SingleArmMRCT/reference/plot_rcp1armBinary.md)
  : Plot Regional Consistency Probability for Single-Arm MRCT (Binary
  Endpoint)

## Count endpoint

Calculate and visualise RCP for count (negative binomial) endpoints.

- [`rcp1armCount()`](https://gosukehommaEX.github.io/SingleArmMRCT/reference/rcp1armCount.md)
  : Regional Consistency Probability for Single-Arm MRCT (Count
  Endpoint)
- [`plot_rcp1armCount()`](https://gosukehommaEX.github.io/SingleArmMRCT/reference/plot_rcp1armCount.md)
  : Plot Regional Consistency Probability for Single-Arm MRCT (Count
  Endpoint)

## Hazard ratio endpoint

Calculate and visualise RCP for time-to-event endpoints using the hazard
ratio.

- [`rcp1armHazardRatio()`](https://gosukehommaEX.github.io/SingleArmMRCT/reference/rcp1armHazardRatio.md)
  : Regional Consistency Probability for Single-Arm MRCT (Time-to-Event
  Endpoint)
- [`plot_rcp1armHazardRatio()`](https://gosukehommaEX.github.io/SingleArmMRCT/reference/plot_rcp1armHazardRatio.md)
  : Plot Regional Consistency Probability for Single-Arm MRCT (Hazard
  Ratio Endpoint)

## Milestone survival endpoint

Calculate and visualise RCP for milestone survival endpoints.

- [`rcp1armMilestoneSurvival()`](https://gosukehommaEX.github.io/SingleArmMRCT/reference/rcp1armMilestoneSurvival.md)
  : Regional Consistency Probability for Single-Arm MRCT (Milestone
  Survival Endpoint)
- [`plot_rcp1armMilestoneSurvival()`](https://gosukehommaEX.github.io/SingleArmMRCT/reference/plot_rcp1armMilestoneSurvival.md)
  : Plot Regional Consistency Probability for Single-Arm MRCT (Milestone
  Survival Endpoint)

## RMST endpoint

Calculate and visualise RCP for restricted mean survival time (RMST)
endpoints.

- [`rcp1armRMST()`](https://gosukehommaEX.github.io/SingleArmMRCT/reference/rcp1armRMST.md)
  : Regional Consistency Probability for Single-Arm MRCT (RMST Endpoint)
- [`plot_rcp1armRMST()`](https://gosukehommaEX.github.io/SingleArmMRCT/reference/plot_rcp1armRMST.md)
  : Plot Regional Consistency Probability for Single-Arm MRCT (RMST
  Endpoint)

## Print methods

S3 print methods for result objects.

- [`print(`*`<rcp1armContinuous>`*`)`](https://gosukehommaEX.github.io/SingleArmMRCT/reference/print.rcp1armContinuous.md)
  : Print Method for rcp1armContinuous Objects
- [`print(`*`<rcp1armBinary>`*`)`](https://gosukehommaEX.github.io/SingleArmMRCT/reference/print.rcp1armBinary.md)
  : Print Method for rcp1armBinary Objects
- [`print(`*`<rcp1armCount>`*`)`](https://gosukehommaEX.github.io/SingleArmMRCT/reference/print.rcp1armCount.md)
  : Print Method for rcp1armCount Objects
- [`print(`*`<rcp1armHazardRatio>`*`)`](https://gosukehommaEX.github.io/SingleArmMRCT/reference/print.rcp1armHazardRatio.md)
  : Print Method for rcp1armHazardRatio Objects
- [`print(`*`<rcp1armMilestoneSurvival>`*`)`](https://gosukehommaEX.github.io/SingleArmMRCT/reference/print.rcp1armMilestoneSurvival.md)
  : Print Method for rcp1armMilestoneSurvival Objects
- [`print(`*`<rcp1armRMST>`*`)`](https://gosukehommaEX.github.io/SingleArmMRCT/reference/print.rcp1armRMST.md)
  : Print Method for rcp1armRMST Objects
